title: tournefortiopsis crassifolia
intro: Tournefortiopsis crassifolia, also known as Chinese coleus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tournefortiopsis crassifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, such as salves and creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
